title: linuxserver/docker-calibre hangs on startup
body:
### Issue Description

The `linuxserver/docker-calibre` container hangs on start. I cannot reproduce this issue with docker.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run the command in the container's README:
```
podman run -d \
  --name=calibre \
  --security-opt seccomp=unconfined `#optional` \
  -e PUID=1000 \
  -e PGID=1000 \
  -e TZ=Etc/UTC \
  -e PASSWORD= `#optional` \
  -e CLI_ARGS= `#optional` \
  -p 8080:8080 \
  -p 8081:8081 \
  -v /path/to/data:/config \
  --restart unless-stopped \
  lscr.io/linuxserver/calibre:latest
  ```

### Describe the results you received

The container logs are as follows:
```                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
[sudo] password for corin:
[migrations] started
[migrations] no migrations found

-------------------------------------
          _         ()
         | |  ___   _    __
         | | / __| | |  /  \
         | | \__ \ | | | () |
         |_| |___/ |_|  \__/


Brought to you by linuxserver.io
-------------------------------------

To support LSIO projects visit:
https://www.linuxserver.io/donate/
-------------------------------------
GID/UID
-------------------------------------

User uid:    1000
User gid:    1000
-------------------------------------


Generating 2048 bit rsa key...

ssl_gen_key_xrdp1 ok

saving to rsakeys.ini

.+.....+.......+...+..+.........+.+.........+..+....+.....+...+.+......+.....+......+....+.....+.+..+...+....+..............+..........+......+..............+..........+......+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++*.......+..+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++*.......+...+.+...........+.............+......+..+.......+..+....+.....+...............+....+...+........+.+...+..+.+...+.....+.......+.....+.......+.....+.............+..................+..............+.+......+...+...+.....+....+.....+.........+....+...+...+...........................+..+............+...+.+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
.+..+...+.........+...+...+....+...+......+.....+.+......+...+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++*......+...+...+.............+..+...+.+...+..+....+.....+.......+..+.+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++*.+..+.+..+......+......+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
-----
**** No auth enabled. To enable auth, you can set the PASSWORD var in docker arguments. ***
[custom-init] No custom files found, skipping...
```
at which point the container hangs indefinitely.

### Describe the results you expected

The container should finish its startup sequence.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

NixOS 22.11

### Additional information

A similar issue is reported at https://github.com/linuxserver/docker-calibre/issues/116, but using docker and could not be reproduced.

Through bisecting the repo I found the first bad commit to be https://github.com/linuxserver/docker-calibre/commit/5b2b489ef19db00abeb2e48d805d65d4a292e41b when using podman to build the Dockerfile from the repository. However, when using prebuilt images from ghcr the issue appears from the 6.9 tag onwards.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Have you tried this in rootful mode?
Have you tried this with podman 4.4?

By rootful do you mean Privileged? `podman` is running as root.

I have not tried with 4.4. I'll try getting it to work on the current NixOS release, but worse case it should be included in the upcoming 23.05 release.

seems to run just fine for me both as root and rootless with podman 4.5 ``` $ podman run -d --name=calibre --security-opt seccomp=unconfined -e PUID=1000 -e PGID=1000 -e TZ=Etc/UTC -p 8080:8080 -p 8081:8081 -v ~/test:/config:Z lscr.io/linuxserver/calibre:latest 092d29eb46e6033717f7bb756bb5e3abc22fb8aaae66e468d23183d9d68644c3 $ podman logs calibre [migrations] started [migrations] no migrations
